transcription.text: The Quintrix 2 color picture tube from Panasonic brings you a very lifelike picture. Because Quintrix 2 is our inline picture tube with an extra pre-focus lens that concentrates and focuses the electron beam to bring you Panasonic's sharpest picture ever. So lifelike, you may even feel you're part of a picture. Quintrix 2. One more reason Panasonic is just slightly...
